title: BELLE VOUS Indestructible Dog Toys (2 Pack) - Tough Dog Toys Indestructible for Aggressive Chewers - Durable Dog Boredom/Teething Toys for All Breeds - Nylon Dog Chew Toys
features: UNIVERSAL DOG CHEW TOYS: This set of 2 tough dog chew toys is perfect for dog owners/pet parents who want to bring joy to their furry friends. Our set includes 2 bone-shaped nylon dog toys for aggressive chewers, they're suitable for dogs of all breeds and sizes.

ALMOST INDESTRUCTIBLE: Crafted from tough nylon, these strong dog toys are durable, sturdy and long-lasting. The dog chew toys are built to withstand everyday use by dogs with strong/aggressive chewing habits, from playful puppies to powerful adults.

IRRESISTIBLY FLAVOURED: Your dog will adore the authentic bacon taste added to these dog teething toys. The taste, scent and vivid colours of the toys will keep your dog's attention, providing fun chewing sessions and giving you a closer, interactive bond.

ELIMINATE DOG BOREDOM: These dog boredom toys will keep your dogs entertained for hours, reducing destructive chewing behaviours around the home. Additionally, the toys can help soothe teething discomfort and promote better dental health.

MONEY BACK SATISFACTION: We believe you'll be satisfied with our heavy-duty dog toys for aggressive chewers. However, in case you're not happy with your purchase, please get in contact with us and we will refund you.
description: Belle Vous Indestructible Dog Toys (2 Pack). Discover the perfect toy set to satisfy your dog's chewing needs with these near-indestructible dog chew toys. The toys are designed for durability and endless enjoyment for your furry best friends. Our bone-shaped toys are not just tough but they're also infused with an irresistible bacon flavour that dogs will love. This set includes 2 bone-shaped toys, one red and one brown-coloured. They're made from strong nylon which can withstand aggressive chewing habits. They're perfect for small, medium and large dogs of all breeds. Not only will these toys last long, but they're also designed with your dog's health in mind. The toys will promote better dental hygiene and soothe teething pain/discomfort. Whether you're the pet parent of a playful puppy or a powerful adult dog, this toy set will keep your dog entertained and free from boredom for hours, helping bring you closer to your furry friend. The mix of vibrant colours and tasty flavour will keep your pet coming back time and time again for fun chewing sessions. What’s Included: -2 x Tough bone-shaped dog chew toys. Dimensions: -Each dog chew toy measures: W5 x L16.5cm (2 x 6.5 inches). -Each dog chew toy weighs: 175g.
